SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.dve.frontend.dsl.gen

Interface dveVisitor<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
dveBaseVisitor
public interface dveVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by dveParser.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    visitAcceptDecl(dveParser.AcceptDeclContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by dveParser.acceptDecl().
    T
    visitAddExpr(dveParser.AddExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the addExpr labeled alternative in dveParser.expr().
